name: When Hope Calls
overview: Sisters Lillian and Grace open an orphanage in the 1916 Western town of Brookfield. Caught between the traditions of cattle ranchers and the ambitions of a growing town, the duo strive to find romance and happiness while overcoming the challenges of helping the children in their care.

trailers.title: When Hope Calls - Home - Premieres August 30 - Hallmark Movies Now
